name: say
description: Local no-key read-aloud for Codex answers, Markdown files, clipboard text, and selected text on macOS.

interface.shortDescription: Read Codex output aloud locally without an API key.
interface.longDescription: Say adds local macOS read-aloud commands for Codex answers, Markdown reports, clipboard text, and selected text. It is designed for cognitive offloading without sending spoken text through an external model.
defaultPrompt: Read the latest Codex answer aloud.
